view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful enrollment and attendance tracking.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement 'Enroll once, attend multiple sessions' is satisfied as evidenced by the successful enrollment and attendance tracking.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by demonstrating that a customer can enroll in a program and attend multiple sessions. The linked use case describes a scenario where Sarah enrolls in a 12-week program and attends 11 out of 12 sessions, which confirms the requirement. Additionally, the system's ability to mark her as 'Complete' and issue a certificate further supports that the requirement is met without any gaps.
